description: BambooHR API key, SSO/SAML, and HRIS-specific PII export red flags.

token_patterns.name: BambooHR API Key
token_patterns.notes: BambooHR API keys are 40-char and used as the Basic-Auth username with literal password 'x'. Leakage = full read on every employee record.

token_patterns.name: BambooHR API URL with embedded key

misconfigurations.title: Single API key used by multiple integrations
misconfigurations.rationale: API keys are user-bound; sharing makes leak attribution and rotation impossible.
misconfigurations.fix: Generate one API key per integration via a dedicated 'Bot' user; rotate ≤ 90 days.

misconfigurations.title: Two-factor authentication not required for admin users
misconfigurations.rationale: BambooHR holds SSN, bank, salary — admin ATO is a major incident.
misconfigurations.fix: Settings > Account > Security > require 2FA for users with Full Admin / Custom-Admin roles.

misconfigurations.title: SSO configured without Just-In-Time provisioning + deprovisioning
misconfigurations.rationale: Stale accounts after offboarding are an audit and access-control failure.
misconfigurations.fix: Settings > Apps > SSO > enable SCIM with the IdP for automatic deprovisioning.

misconfigurations.title: BambooHR webhook handler does not verify webhook signature header
misconfigurations.rationale: Webhook signing was added for tenant-isolation; absence allows spoofed HRIS events.
misconfigurations.fix: Verify the configured webhook secret HMAC over the body for every inbound POST.

admin_red_flags.title: Custom Report export covering all employees by non-HR principal
admin_red_flags.rationale: All-employee exports surface SSN, bank, comp — top HRIS-leak vector.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `Custom Report exported` with row count = active employee count, actor not in HR admin group.

admin_red_flags.title: Multiple API keys generated for one user in a short window
User promoted to Full Admin role
admin_red_flags.rationale: Admin role grant is the canonical privilege-escalation step.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `Access Level changed to Full Admin` outside scheduled IT changes.
